label: Seasonal naive (7d)
blurb: Copies last week day-for-day — an implicit lag-7 coefficient of exactly 1.0, which this series rewards.

label: Lag regression (7/14/28)
blurb: Sees recent levels, but least squares shrinks the lag weights and under-reacts to the holiday ramp.

label: Calendar regression
blurb: Knows weekdays and months, but can't see the series' current level at all.

label: Naive last-value
blurb: Repeats yesterday forever — flat lines through a weekly cycle.

label: Moving average (7d)
blurb: Smooths the weekly cycle away instead of exploiting it.
